articles.title: House Dems dodge questions on SCOTUS trans athlete ruling, shift blame to 'culture wars'

articles.title: Trump hails America as 'most exceptional nation ever to exist' in Mount Rushmore speech

articles.title: Sports world turns out for Travis Kelce and Taylor Swift's Madison Square Garden wedding festivities
articles.summary: Adam Sandler officiated the ceremony as athletes like George Kittle, Kareem Hunt and Matthew Stafford celebrated at Madison Square Garden.

articles.title: Messi, Argentina avoid a shocking upset in wild knockout stage match against Cape Verde
articles.summary: Lionel Messi's historic 20th World Cup goal wasn't enough as Cape Verde twice equalized before an own goal in extra time sealed the win for Argentina.

articles.summary: A fast-moving storm capsized a boat Friday on Geneva Lake in Wisconsin, killing three people during the busy Fourth of July holiday weekend.

articles.title: USA's Folarin Balogun criticizes referee's red card in first comments since controversial ruling
articles.summary: Folarin Balogun broke his silence on the controversial red card, saying the call was not correct and a yellow card would have been fair for the play.

articles.title: Taylor Swift marries Travis Kelce
articles.summary: Pop icon Taylor Swift said yes to NFL star Travis Kelce at their wedding. The Kansas City Chiefs tight end proposed to Swift back in 2025.

articles.title: Socialist Colorado candidate blames Israel for 'putting Jewish people in great danger'
articles.summary: Far-left Colorado Democratic candidate Melat Kiros said in an interview that Israel is putting Jewish people in grave danger and inspiring antisemitic attacks worldwide.

articles.title: ESPN makes right decision by removing Rich Eisen from play-by-play amid NFL Network acquisition
articles.summary: Rich Eisen says he is done calling NFL games after ESPN removed him from broadcasts, with Dave Pasch expected to replace him on NFL Network.

articles.title: Patriots head coach Mike Vrabel, wife spotted en route to Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's wedding
articles.summary: Mike Vrabel and his wife, Jen, were spotted arriving in New York City for the wedding, marking their first public appearance since the Dianna Russini scandal.

articles.title: Flyers make stunning offer sheet for Ducks star Leo Carlsson in blockbuster NHL move
articles.summary: The Philadelphia Flyers offered Leo Carlsson a five-year deal at an $18 million AAV, and now the Anaheim Ducks have just one week to match it.

articles.title: Caitlin Clark named Eastern Conference Player of the Month despite only playing 10 games
articles.summary: Caitlin Clark averaged 21.9 points and 8.2 assists over 10 June games while setting a WNBA record by recording at least 20 points and five assists in six consecutive games.

articles.title: Trump grants pardons to 'persecuted' mechanics in right-to-repair crackdown: 'I am setting them all free'

articles.summary: Folarin Balogun says his red card against Bosnia and Herzegovina was unintentional as FIFA confirms a one-match suspension ahead of the Belgium clash.
